3084630.name: Program Penguin
3084630.description:
Slash, shoot, and slide through Program Penguin, the minimalist adventure game bursting with birds, bad puns, and enough toilet humor to surely provoke a pity laugh or two. Explore the Antarctic Server and fend off impending doom in the form of the deadly computer virus. Discover items, unearth secrets, and battle baddies in this bold and bubbly bombastic bird-based bash!

** Notice To All Players: This game contains imagery that may harm players with photosensitive epilepsy or similar conditions. **

Features:

  • Acquire Items: 

    Obtain a variety of items that are quirky, questionable and downright morally wrong.

  • Fight Enemies:

    Shoot penguins, robots and anything else unfortunate enough to turn its back to you in this real-time action-adventure game.

  • Solve Puzzles:

    Use abilities and items to solve a number of unusual puzzles in this 2-hour indie game made by a single person.

  • Battle Bosses:

    Face 3 funky, mad and memorable bosses in the only video game that feels like a fart joke met a fever dream and rolled it all up into one penguin themed package.
